text: Romania's Constitutional Court annulled the presidential election first round citing Russian interference via TikTok and Telegram. Declassified intelligence files exposed evidence of voting manipulation through social media platforms, illegal campaign financing on TikTok, cyber-attacks orchestrated by external forces and suspected Russian interference. The intelligence assessments compared the TikTok operation structure to previous Russian campaigns in Ukraine highlighting its clandestine network management and reliance on micro-influencers and troll farms.
